activities_projects.title: Main Characters List
activities_projects.objective: Identify the characters in the story
steps: Read the lesson carefully
List the characters mentioned in the story
Write one sentence about each character
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Identifies characters and their roles in the story

activities_projects.title: Character Sketch of Iswaran
steps: Read the parts describing Iswaran
Write 4–5 lines about his qualities and behaviour

activities_projects.title: Mahendra’s Job
steps: Find the paragraph describing Mahendra’s work
Write 3–4 sentences about his job and responsibilities
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the background of the story

activities_projects.title: Iswaran as a Cook
activities_projects.objective: Recognize Iswaran’s role in Mahendra’s life
steps: Read the lesson carefully
Write three points showing how Iswaran helps Mahendra

activities_projects.title: The Story of the Elephant
activities_projects.objective: Understand the incident narrated by Iswaran
steps: Read the part about the mad elephant
Write 4–5 sentences explaining the incident
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands important events in the story
activities_projects.evaluation: Clear explanation of the incident (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Ghost Story Description
activities_projects.objective: Understand the supernatural story told by Iswaran
steps: Read the ghost story narrated by Iswaran
Write 3–4 sentences describing the ghost

activities_projects.title: Sequence of Events
activities_projects.objective: Understand the order of events in the story
steps: Identify four major events in the lesson
Write them in the correct order

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary from the Lesson
steps: Choose five difficult words from the lesson
Write their meanings
Use them in sentences
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct meanings and sentence usage (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Mahendra’s Fear
activities_projects.objective: Understand Mahendra’s reaction to the ghost story
steps: Read the last part of the story
Write 3–4 sentences about why Mahendra became frightened

activities_projects.title: Moral of the Story
activities_projects.objective: Understand the message of the lesson
steps: Think about what the story teaches us
Write the moral in your own words
activities_projects.evaluation: Logical explanation of the moral (10 marks)
